method: Positives: exact privacy-email match, or street-number+zip address match with >=0.5 name-token overlap, between the 2025 five-state merge and CA 2026 registry. Negatives: deterministic stride sample sharing no email domain, address key, or name tokens. Signals are independent of the resolver (domains + name slugs). Frozen once committed; delete deliberately to relabel.

pairs.label: non_match
pairs.evidence: no shared email domain, address, or name tokens

pairs.label: match
pairs.evidence: street number + zip match with name overlap (Accurate Append Inc / Accurate Append Inc.)
